message.content:
SMS
PORTAL
Navigating SMS, Your Way

Key Features

1
Branded Name
with Masking SMS
It can be utilized for marketing
purpose beside this, you can send
any type of SMS through our system.
(i.e. Promotional messages, results
announcement, any kind of function
information etc.)

2
Message Alerts
The second most interested
feature is the message alerts. Our
every module this feature has
been integrated. i.e

• Auto Generated Inquiry SMS
• Auto Generated admissions SMS
• Auto Generated struck off SMS
• Auto Generated short leave SMS
• Auto Generated Absents SMS
• Auto Generated fee deposit SMS
• Auto Generated fee cancelation SMS
• Auto Generated check in/out SMS of staff
• Send SMS to staff
• Send SMS to Students
• Send SMS to visitors
• Send SMS to parents
• Book Issuance
